response.original_title: 1-866-216-0631 How do I recover my wallet after losing my device?
response.overview: ☎️ 1-(866)-216-0631 Regaining access to your digital tokens requires the use of the recovery phrase provided during your initial setup ☎️ 1-(866)-216-0631(no wait). If you lost your phone, simply download the app on a new device to begin recovery ☎️ 1-(866)-216-0631(no wait). Your Onchain wallet login experience depends entirely on the accuracy of the twelve words you enter into the system ☎️ 1-(866)-216-0631(no wait). Because this is a non-custodial service, the platform cannot reset your password or recover your phrase for you ☎️ 1-(866)-216-0631(no wait). Your funds remain safe on the blockchain as long as your recovery phrase is kept in a secure place ☎️ 1-(866)-216-0631(no wait).
